_clock_note: each PE computes FP16 mul + FP32 adds combinationally in one cycle; measured post-route setup WNS was -34.2 ns at the ss/1v60 corner with a 25 ns clock, so 65 ns (~15 MHz) closes worst-case with margin. Pipelining the PE is the path to a faster macro.
_klayout_note: 8x npc.2 flagged by the KLayout sky130 deck are known false positives around tap rows; magic DRC - the PDK reference checker - reports 0 and remains the hard signoff gate.
_comment: yosys's SAT-based share pass explodes past 32 GB VM on the flattened 16-PE systolic array (OOM-killed twice). SYNTH_SHARE_RESOURCES is declared but NOT honored by openlane 2.3.10's pyosys script (run_pass('share') is unconditional); deferred_flatten makes the opt pipeline run per-module (167-cell PEs = trivial SAT) with flattening deferred to the ABC resynthesis step
